findings.title: Iran-US-Israel direct military exchanges escalate
findings.summary: Tensions escalated into direct military exchanges including rapid airstrikes and retaliatory attacks between Iran, US, and Israel. This affects I2 military posture, indicating heightened direct confrontation. UN warns of uncontrollable chain of events.
findings.claim_excerpt: Tensions between Iran, the United States, and Israel have escalated into direct military exchanges.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Risk of wider regional war increases with direct state-on-state strikes beyond proxies.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple sources reference ongoing US-Israeli-Iran war and exchanges.

sources_cited.excerpt: US-Israeli war on Iran, early assumptions unravelled
Trump's path forward on Iran will determine US-Israeli war alignment

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Cross-corroborated by policy analysis and expert segments; aligns with UN warnings.

findings.review_reason: Potential for nuclear or proxy spillover

findings.title: Ukraine escalates mid-range drone strikes behind Russian lines
findings.summary: Ukraine regains drone war initiative with mid-range strikes targeting Russian logistics. This constitutes I2 escalation via range extension beyond baseline drone warfare. Campaign underlines invasion support vulnerabilities.
findings.claim_excerpt: Ukraine is winning the drone war with strike campaign behind Russian lines.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Shifts momentum in attritional air campaign, pressuring Russian sustainment.
findings.confidence_basis: Expert analysis from think tank with real-time tracking.

sources_cited.excerpt: Ukraine has regained the initiative from Russia in the world's first full-scale drone war
fighting is still ongoing in Ukraine

search_queries_run: Ukraine drone strikes Russia April 2026 ISW
research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Matches ISW-style daily updates; drone range extension qualifies per rules.

findings.review_reason: Assess if drone doctrine shift sustains

findings.title: Fragile ceasefire holds in Gaza amid displacement crisis
findings.summary: A fragile ceasefire implemented in Gaza follows October 2023 escalation, but over 2 million remain displaced with aid dependency. Impacts I6 displacement velocity as de-escalating from active fighting phase. Trapped population heightens humanitarian risks.
findings.claim_excerpt: fragile ceasefire has been implemented in Gaza.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Reduces immediate violence but sustains crisis without resolution.

sources_cited.excerpt: fragile ceasefire has been implemented in Gaza
over 70,000 Gazans have been killed and over 2 million displaced

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Ceasefire status corroborated; displacement figures stable.

findings.title: Sudan fighting shifts to Kordofan solidifying east-west divide
findings.summary: Combat moves to Kordofan region as Sudan's conflict solidifies east-west divide since 2023 onset. Affects I2 military posture with geographic diffusion. Humanitarian systems remain collapsed.
findings.claim_excerpt: Fighting moves to Kordofan as Sudan's east–west divide solidifies.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Expands frontlines, complicating access and prolonging war.

sources_cited.excerpt: Fighting moves to Kordofan as Sudan's east–west divide solidifies
Sudan civil war has been raging since April 2023

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Tier 1 ACLED event data; under-covered theatre signal sought.

findings.title: Haiti criminal violence worsens per global tracker
findings.summary: Gang crisis in Haiti shows worsening status with ongoing criminal violence. Impacts I2 military posture via armed group expansion. US interests significantly affected.

findings.title: Sahel violent extremism continues worsening
findings.summary: Violent extremism in Sahel arc (Mali incl.) worsens with transnational terrorism. Affects I2 via armed group activity. Limited US interests but persistent escalation.
